message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 3.1.0 Get Participant Callback Details

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFDE6
  GroupBorderColor #000000
  GroupBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBorderColor #666666
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF36A
}

box "ML API Adapter Service" #BFE3F2
  actor "ML-API-ADAPTER" as MLA
end box

box "Central Services" #FFFDE6
  boundary "Central Service API" as CSA
  control "Participant Handler" as PH
  entity "Participant DAO" as DAO
  database "Central Store" as CS
end box

== Get Callback Details ==

MLA -> CSA : 1 Request to get callback details - GET - /participants/{name}/endpoints?type={typeValue}
activate CSA

CSA -> PH : 2 Fetch Callback details for Participant
activate PH

PH -> DAO : 3 Fetch Participant\n<color:red>Error code: 3200</color>
activate DAO

DAO -> CS : 4 Fetch Participant
activate CS
CS --> DAO : 5 Retrieved Participant
deactivate CS

DAO --> PH : 6 Return Participant
deactivate DAO

PH -> PH : 7 Validate DFSP
PH -> PH : 8 check if "type" parameter is sent

alt Check if "type" parameter is sent (Sent)
  PH -> DAO : 9 Fetch Callback details for Participant and type\n<color:red>Error code: 3000</color>
  activate DAO
  DAO -> CS : 10 Fetch Callback details for Participant and type
  activate CS
  note right of DAO #DDDDDD
    Condition:
    isActive = 1
    [endpointTypeId = <type>]
  end note
  CS --> DAO : 11 Retrieved Callback details for Participant and type
  deactivate CS
  DAO --> PH : 12 Return Callback details for Participant and type
  deactivate DAO

  note right of PH #FFF36A
    Message:
    {
      endpoints: {type: <type>, value: <value>}
    }
  end note

  PH --> CSA : 13 Return Callback details for Participant
else Check if "type" parameter is sent (Not Sent)
  PH -> DAO : 15 Fetch Callback details for Participant\n<color:red>Error code: 3000</color>
  activate DAO
  DAO -> CS : 16 Fetch Callback details for Participant
  activate CS
  note right of DAO #DDDDDD
    Condition:
    isActive = 1
  end note
  CS --> DAO : 17 Retrieved Callback details for Participant
  deactivate CS
  DAO --> PH : 18 Return Callback details for Participant
  deactivate DAO

  note right of PH #FFF36A
    Message:
    {
      endpoints: [
        {type: <type>, value: <value>},
        {type: <type>, value: <value>}
      ]
    }
  end note

  PH --> CSA : 19 Return Callback details for Participant
end

CSA --> MLA : 14 Return Callback details for Participant
CSA --> MLA : 20 Return Callback details for Participant

alt Validate participant (failure) / Error
  note right of PH #FF3B30
    Validation failure / Error:
  end note
  note right of PH #FFF36A
    Message:
    {
      "errorInformation": {
        "errorCode": <errorCode>,
        "errorDescription": <ErrorMessage>,
      }
    }
  end note
  PH --> CSA : 21 Return <color:red>Error code: 3000, 3200</color>
  CSA --> MLA : 22 Return <color:red>Error code: 3000, 3200</color>
end

deactivate PH
deactivate CSA
@enduml
```
